name: claw-gold
description: ClawGold v2.0 — AI-powered XAUUSD trading with LiteLLM, APScheduler, and advanced strategies
author: JonusNattapong

features.litellm_integration: Unified AI provider interface with automatic fallback
features.apscheduler_backend: Persistent background job scheduling with crash recovery
features.rich_logging: Enhanced console output with colors, panels, and tables
features.cost_tracking: Real-time LLM cost analytics per provider

tools.name: get_xauusd_price
tools.description: Fetch current XAUUSD price in real-time

tools.name: calculate_moving_average
tools.description: Calculate EMA/SMA across multiple timeframes (M15, H1, H4, D1)

tools.name: generate_trading_signal
tools.description: Generate BUY/SELL/HOLD signals with confidence scores via MA crossover

tools.name: execute_trade
tools.description: Execute buy/sell trades via MT5 integration with risk management

tools.name: get_portfolio_status
tools.description: Get live account balance, positions, P&L, and margin status

tools.name: ai_research
tools.description: Multi-AI market research with LiteLLM (OpenCode, KiloCode, Gemini, Codex)

tools.name: get_market_sentiment
tools.description: Real-time sentiment analysis from news aggregation and AI consensus

tools.name: get_agent_metrics
tools.description: View per-tool performance metrics (success rate, response time, costs)

tools.name: get_scheduled_tasks
tools.description: List all scheduled trading tasks and their status

tools.name: get_cost_report
tools.description: Get LLM cost breakdown by provider and date range

highlights: ✅ Rich enhanced console logging with colors/panels/tables
✅ Real-time LLM cost tracking per provider
